commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bundled channel setup-runtime registration hook, routes configured Slack HTTP webhook registration through Slack setup entry, defers configured Slack full runtime load until after gateway listen, updates docs, and adds loader/gateway/Slack tests.

PR surface: Source +68, Tests +303, Docs +11, Config +3. Total +385 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a performance/compatibility PR rather than a bug report. The PR body gives after-fix local gateway startup trace proof for the intended startup ordering.
